title: Fancy Vanilla
description: Modpack for people who love beautiful Minecraft
body:
# !!!WARNING!!!
###  First version is unstable! You might have issues with your old vanilla world.
###  PLEASE DON'T PLAY YOUR OLD WORLDS WITH THIS MODPACK CAUSE YOU CAN LOST THEM!
###  PLAY ONLY NEW FV WORLDS!
###  THX FOR READING, BE CAREFULL

# This Modpack is for people with average computers and a great love for beautiful Minecraft.
1.  ### Modback is almost vanilla. Has custom generation from the Terralith mod.
2.  ### I also added several resource packs that you will definitely like.
3.  ### Don't forget about the wonderful Bliss shaders that I also included here.
![Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fd6687df33a5fae16a03d14e99a4bd10140a24f.jpeg)
